subcodes.first_line: The letter and handwriting of that Beloved of hearts, like unto the fragrances of the love of the Lord of all beings, hath perfumed the realm of contingent existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه و دستخط آنمحبوب فواد چون نفحات حب مولی الوری از آن متضوع عالم امکانرا
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @consultation, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @business; financial; property matters, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
